raw_text:
<think>
Let me analyze this carefully.

The task is to decide whether the change CHG-934 can execute at the requested UTC time.

First, let me understand the timezone conversion:
- The approved window is 11:30 to 12:15 PT (Pacific Time)
- PT equals UTC-7 on 2026-07-03
- So the approval window in UTC would be:
  - Start: 11:30 PT = 18:30 UTC
  - End: 12:15 PT = 19:15 UTC

The requested execution time is 20:45Z (20:45 UTC) on 2026-07-03.

Comparing:
- Approved UTC window: 18:30 to 19:15 UTC
- Requested execution: 20:45 UTC

20:45 UTC is AFTER 19:15 UTC, which is the end of the approved window.

So the requested execution time falls OUTSIDE the approved window.

According to the policy POL-CHG-TZ: "Change execution requires the execution time to fall inside the approved local site window after timezone conversion."

Since 20:45 UTC is outside the approved window of 18:30-19:15 UTC, this action must be ESCALATED.

The blockers are:
- The requested time (20:45 UTC) falls outside the approved window (11:30-12:15 PT = 18:30-19:15 UTC)

Let me format the output correctly:
- solo_role=ONE_SHOT_SOURCE_BOUNDARY_VERIFIER
- verification_verdict=ESCALATE
- binding_class=SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN
- action_boundary=Requested execution time 20:45 UTC must fall within approved window 11:30-12:15 PT after timezone conversion
- cited_evidence=WIN-CHG-934 | TZ-SITE-L | POL-CHG-TZ | REQ-CHG-934


- open_blockers=Requested time 20:45 UTC is outside approved window converted to 18:30-19:15 UTC
- final_answer=ESCALATE - the requested execution time of 20:45 UTC falls outside the approved window of 18:30-19:15 UTC after timezone conversion
</think>

solo_role=ONE_SHOT_SOURCE_BOUNDARY_VERIFIER
verification_verdict=ESCALATE
binding_class=SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN
action_boundary=Requested UTC time must fall within approved local site window after timezone conversion
cited_evidence=WIN-CHG-934|TZ-SITE-L|POL-CHG-TZ|REQ-CHG-934
open_blockers=Requested execution time 20:45 UTC falls outside approved window 11:30-12:15 PT (18:30-19:15 UTC)
final_answer=ESCALATE - the requested execution at 20:45 UTC cannot proceed because it falls after the end of the approved window (19:15 UTC), violating the timezone-converted boundary requirement in POL-CHG-TZ.
